message:
fix(conformance): update HELLO fixture to match server info response

Update fr_p2c_004_acl_journey.json: HELLO with no args now returns
server info array instead of wrong-arity error, and HELLO with SETNAME
option returns successful proto-3 response instead of syntax error.
Aligns fixture expectations with the new HELLO command behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
